top.name: Temporal Inversion
top.rules_text: Reverse the order of all spells on the stack. The spell that was going to resolve last now resolves first.

channel.name: Temporal Inversion (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also add a copy of your last cast spell to the top of the stack

bottom.name: Phase Anchor
bottom.rules_text: Create 2 Phase tiles within range 2. You may teleport between them as a free action once per turn. Lasts 3 turns.

channel.name: Phase Anchor (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Create 3 Phase tiles and lasts 4 turns
